title: Vanilla+ Spruce Hotbar
description:
This pack redesigns the default hotbar with a carved spruce-inspired style.

Nothing else in the game is changed this is a hotbar-only resource pack.

The design stays true to vanilla Minecraft while adding subtle depth, darker wood tones etc.
body:
# Vanilla+ Spruce Hotbar

> A subtle, vanilla-friendly hotbar redesign inspired by darker spruce tones.

## Features
- Custom carved spruce-style hotbar
- Refined depth and shading for a more natural look
- Reinforced metal pin accents
- Redesigned selection highlight
- Custom offhand slot

## Scope
- **Hotbar only**
- No other GUI elements changed
- No blocks, items, or menus modified

# Message From Creator:
Just a heads up this is my **VERY FIRST** resource pack. It’s definitely going to be **improved and refined over time** as **I learn more** and **update it.** I’m not expecting it to **blow up or anything,** but I **wanted to put it out there and start somewhere.**
